
# Extention Backup :
``` bash
code.cmd --list-extensions > extensions-backup.txt
```

# Delete Room :
``` bash
cd "path"
rm -rf *   #remove all normal files/folders
rm -rf .*  #remove all hidden files/folders (dotfiles)
rm -rf * .* #both
```

# Shut down:
``` txt
win + r OR terminal
shutdown /s /t 3600
to cancel
shutdown /a
```
